name: babysit-pr
description: Watch GitHub pull requests for review comments, CI failures, and mergeability changes.

interface.shortDescription: Watch PR comments, CI, and mergeability
interface.longDescription: Use PR Babysitter to keep monitoring an open GitHub pull request, surface new review feedback, diagnose CI failures, and continue polling until the PR closes or needs human help.
defaultPrompt: Babysit the current PR until it closes or needs help.
Watch this PR for CI failures and review feedback.
Monitor the PR and fix actionable review comments.
